# Tutorial: mirrored-database editor

> CSA Loom `mirrored-database` editor — confirmed working against the live console on 2026-05-26.

## Open the editor

1. Sign in to **CSA Loom Console** at https://loom-console-fvbbctd4eehqbkcs.b02.azurefd.net.
2. Open or create a workspace from the **Workspaces** page.
3. Click **+ New item** and choose **mirrored database** from the catalog.
4. The editor opens at `/items/mirrored-database/<id>`:

![mirrored-database editor](./img/editor-mirrored-database.png)

## What this editor does

The mirrored-database editor is one of the 59 A-grade editors that load cleanly against real Azure backends in the Loom v3.18 release. See the [Learn drawer](../../apps/fiab-console/lib/learn/content.ts) inside the editor for the full description, steps, and Microsoft Learn links.
